title: Pentagon UFO files drop: Roswell mystery resurfaces as eerie space sightings ignited alien chatter
description: Apollo missions, mystery objects, and the Area 51 questions no one answered.

title: New batch of UFO records from feds reveals secret meetings at Los Alamos
description: Once "top secret," new documents shed light on U.S. government investigations into UFO phenomena in the Land of Enchantment

title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
description: The Pentagon has begun releasing files on UFOs, tapping into public curiosity about unidentified phenomena. The files feature intriguing sightings, such as a bright object making 90-degree turns over Kazakhstan and Buzz Aldrin observing a light source during Apollo 11....

title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
description: The psychic calls out NASA for lying over the years about the lunar UAP events

title: Pentagon begins releasing new UFO files
